top3.sql:
SELECT MIN(lapTimes.milliseconds) AS lap_record
FROM lapTimes
JOIN races ON lapTimes.raceId = races.raceId
JOIN circuits ON races.circuitId = circuits.circuitId
WHERE circuits.name = 'Red Bull Ring' AND races.name LIKE '%Austrian Grand Prix%';

final.sql:

JOIN circuits ON races.circuitId = circuits.circuitId
WHERE circuits.name = 'Red Bull Ring' AND races.name LIKE '%Austrian Grand Prix%';
